en-US.summary: Control your network printer with voice commands
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask my printer to check ink levels
Alexa, ask my printer for the status
Alexa, ask my printer to print hello world
en-US.name: My Printer
en-US.description: Control your HP Color LaserJet printer with voice commands. Check ink levels, printer status, print text, manage print jobs, and test connectivity.

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Account linking required. Use OAuth credentials configured in the Lambda environment.
